sentences.target: Der Dialog mit dir tut mir gut.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ di̯aˈloːk mɪt diːɐ̯ tuːt miːɐ̯ guːt/

translations.de: Der Dialog mit dir tut mir gut.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ di̯aˈloːk mɪt diːɐ̯ tuːt miːɐ̯ guːt/
translations.en: Talking with you is good for me.
translations.fr: Parler avec toi me fait du bien.
translations.it: Parlare con te mi fa bene.
translations.zh-Hans: 跟你聊天让我感觉很好。
translations.yue: 同你傾偈我覺得好舒服。
translations.pt: Conversar com você me faz bem.
translations.vi: Nói chuyện với bạn làm tôi thấy dễ chịu.
translations.nl: Met jou praten doet me goed.
translations.uk: Мені добре, коли ми з тобою говоримо.
translations.hi: तुमसे बात करके मुझे अच्छा लगता है।
translations.pl: Rozmowa z tobą dobrze mi robi.
translations.el: Το να μιλάω μαζί σου μου κάνει καλό.
translations.nb: Det er godt for meg å snakke med deg.
translations.id: Ngobrol dengan kamu bikin aku merasa nyaman.
translations.sv: Att prata med dig får mig att må bra.
translations.ro: Să vorbesc cu tine îmi prinde bine.
translations.cs: Mluvit s tebou mi dělá dobře.
translations.da: Det er godt for mig at tale med dig.
translations.ja: あなたと話すと気持ちが楽になります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Dialog'.
Common noun; masculine; singular; nominative; subject of the clause.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the PP 'mit dir' (prepositional modifier).
Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular; dative; object of 'mit'.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present; main predicate in V2 position.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; dative; experiencer/indirect object with 'gut tun'.
Adjective used predicatively; complement in the idiomatic construction 'jmdm. gut tun'.

sentences.target: Wir suchen den Dialog mit den Nachbarn.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈzuːxən deːn di̯aˈloːk mɪt deːn ˈnaχbaʁn/

translations.de: Wir suchen den Dialog mit den Nachbarn.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈzuːxən deːn di̯aˈloːk mɪt deːn ˈnaχbaʁn/
translations.en: We’re seeking dialogue with the neighbors.
translations.fr: Nous voulons parler avec les voisins.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn nói chuyện với hàng xóm.
translations.nl: We willen met de buren praten.
translations.hi: हम पड़ोसियों से बात करना चाहते हैं।
translations.el: Θέλουμε να μιλήσουμε με τους γείτονες.
translations.id: Kami ingin berbicara dengan para tetangga.
translations.da: Vi vil gerne tale med naboerne.
translations.ja: 近所の人たちと話したいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural; nominative; subject.
Finite verb; 1st person plural present; main predicate; selects accusative object.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Dialog'.
Common noun; masculine; singular; accusative; direct object of 'suchen'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the PP 'mit den Nachbarn'.
Definite article; dative plural; determiner of 'Nachbarn'.
Common noun; plural; dative; object of 'mit'.

sentences.target: Im Team hilft der Dialog oft.

translations.de: Im Team hilft der Dialog oft.
translations.en: In the team, dialogue often helps.
translations.es: En el equipo, hablar suele ayudar.
translations.fr: Dans une équipe, parler aide souvent.
translations.ko: 팀에서는 대화가 도움이 될 때가 많아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 在团队里，沟通常常有帮助。
translations.yue: 喺團隊入面，溝通通常有幫助。
translations.tr: Takımda konuşmak çoğu zaman işe yarar.
translations.vi: Trong nhóm, nói chuyện thường giúp ích.
translations.ar: في الفريق، التواصل غالبًا ما يساعد.
translations.nl: In een team helpt praten vaak.
translations.hi: टीम में बात करना अक्सर मदद करता है।
translations.el: Σε μια ομάδα, η συζήτηση συχνά βοηθά.
translations.nb: I et team hjelper det ofte å snakke sammen.
translations.sv: I ett team hjälper det ofta att prata.
translations.da: I et team hjælper det ofte at tale sammen.
translations.ja: チームでは、話し合いがよく役立ちます。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; forms a fronted locative PP.
Common noun; neuter; singular; dative; complement of 'im'.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present; main predicate; V2 order with subject after the verb.
Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Dialog'.
Common noun; masculine; singular; nominative; subject.
Adverb of frequency; modifies the verb.

sentences.target: Unser Dialog gestern war ziemlich offen.

translations.de: Unser Dialog gestern war ziemlich offen.
translations.en: Our dialogue yesterday was pretty open.
translations.es: Nuestra conversación de ayer fue bastante abierta.
translations.fr: Notre conversation d’hier était assez ouverte.
translations.it: La nostra conversazione di ieri è stata abbastanza aperta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们昨天的谈话挺坦诚的。
translations.ru: Наш вчерашний разговор был довольно откровенным.
translations.pt: Nossa conversa de ontem foi bem aberta.
translations.he: השיחה שלנו אתמול הייתה די פתוחה.
translations.vi: Cuộc trò chuyện hôm qua của chúng ta khá cởi mở.
translations.ar: حديثنا أمس كان صريحًا إلى حد كبير.
translations.nl: Ons gesprek van gisteren was best openhartig.
translations.uk: Учорашня наша розмова була доволі відвертою.
translations.hu: A tegnapi beszélgetésünk elég nyílt volt.
translations.hi: कल हमारी बातचीत काफी खुली थी।
translations.pl: Nasza wczorajsza rozmowa była dość otwarta.
translations.el: Η συζήτησή μας χθες ήταν αρκετά ανοιχτή.
translations.nb: Samtalen vår i går var ganske åpen.
translations.sv: Vårt samtal i går var ganska öppet.
translations.ro: Discuția noastră de ieri a fost destul de deschisă.
translations.cs: Náš včerejší rozhovor byl docela otevřený.
translations.da: Vores samtale i går var ret åben.
translations.ja: 昨日の会話はかなり率直でした。

Adjective; predicative complement of the copula 'war'.
